<a id="class-renderscenedatard"></a>

# RenderSceneDataRD

**Inherits:** [RenderSceneData](class_renderscenedata.md#class-renderscenedata) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Render scene data implementation for the RenderingDevice based renderers.

## Description

Object holds scene data related to rendering a single frame of a viewport. See also [RenderSceneData](class_renderscenedata.md#class-renderscenedata), [RenderData](class_renderdata.md#class-renderdata), and [RenderDataRD](class_renderdatard.md#class-renderdatard).

**Note:** This is an internal rendering server object. Do not instantiate this class from a script.
